query: What is the current market trend and macro outlook?

justification.Recall@K: Recall@6=1.0000. Recall@6 measures whether all queried tickers appear in top-6 results. This value is critical for financial Q&A. Missed ticker = missed facts.
justification.MRR: MRR=1.0000. MRR measures the rank position of the first relevant chunk. Low MRR buries relevant context below noise in the LLM prompt.
justification.source_coverage: source_coverage=0.5000. Fraction of expected KB sources (['macro', 'tickers']) that appear in top-6 results. Low coverage means the intent router is over-relying on one KB.

retrieved_chunks.text: Current market regime: RISK_ON. Risk-on: VIX at 24.9, positive yield curve (0.53pp spread), inflation within range. Conditions favour growth equities and risk assets.
CPI inflation is 2.66 percent YoY, near the Fed's target. Unemployment rate is 4.4 percent. GDP growth last quarter was 0.7 percent annualised (expansion).
Federal Funds rate is 3.64 percent. 10-year Treasury yield is 4.35 percent. 2-year Treasury yield is 3.82 percent. Yield curve is positive (0.53pp spread), consistent with growth expectations.

Broad market 30-day: S&P 500 negative 4.99 percent over 30 days; Nasdaq-100 negative 4.96 percent over 30 days; Russell 2000 negative 5.83 percent over 30 days. Large-cap outperforming small-cap — risk-on breadth.

30-day sector leaders: Energy (positive 8.10 percent), Utilities (negative 2.45 percent), Financials (negative 3.27 percent). Laggards: Consumer Staples (negative 7.07 percent), Healthcare (negative 7.14 percent), Industrials (negative 9.34 percent). Mixed sector leadership — no clear rotation signal.
